## ✨ New

- **Organizations — share recordings with your team.** Sign in, then in **Settings → Account** create an organization and invite teammates by their Google email (they accept the invite inside the app — no email is sent). In **History**, a new **Shared** section in the sidebar shows each org as a shared folder; hit **Share to org** on any of your recordings to copy it in, and everyone in the org can open it. Your personal library stays separate — sharing is always an explicit copy, and nothing personal is ever mixed into an org.

## 🐛 Fixes

- Internal hardening to the cloud sync layer (shared auth-fetch seam) alongside the new org work.

## macOS — how to open

This build is **ad-hoc signed** (not yet notarized with an Apple Developer ID). In-app auto-updates install cleanly and shouldn't trip a prompt. For a manual install, on first open macOS shows a security prompt:

- **Right-click (or Control-click) the app → Open → Open**, or
- **System Settings → Privacy & Security → Open Anyway** (after the first blocked attempt).

If a download still shows "damaged", clear the quarantine once:

```
xattr -cr /Applications/Parley.app
```
